resources.string: Front camera ready. Hold the phone comfortably and follow the on-screen calibration dot.
No face detected. Center one face in the preview.
Camera permission is required to track gaze.
Align your face with the screen so both eyes stay visible.
Look at the center dot to calibrate
Waiting for stable face landmarks...\n\nThe app will collect a short center-fixation calibration, then estimate gaze from iris motion, pose compensation, and confidence-aware smoothing.
Tap the button above to grant Camera permission. If permission was permanently denied, open the app settings and enable Camera.
